title: Dry Roasted Brazilian Chicken Skewers
description: A traditional Brazilian dish featuring marinated chicken skewers roasted to perfection, served with a side of rice and syrup, this recipe is tamasic friendly and suitable for an ayurvedic diet. The use of jocheong, a Korean rice syrup, adds a unique flavor to the dish.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together jocheong, olive oil, lime juice, garlic, ginger, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated chicken onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roast the skewers in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Remove the skewers from the oven and let them rest for 5 minutes.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
